channel.title: The Resonant Builders — Essays & Ideas
channel.description: Exploring how quantum-informed signal models can reshape the way we communicate — commercially, socially, and culturally.

item.title: The Awakening: Tuning into the Signal of Human Potential
item.description: We are living through the slow decay of digital platforms—but something is stirring. A 20-year journey into observer resonance, Hilbert Space vectors, and the iDIG protocol.
